channel.title: 文献追踪系统
channel.description: 自动追踪 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉领域最新文献

item.title: 液晶实现室温下按需斯格明子生成
item.description:
📚 Physics News
研究人员提出一种利用光、热和电场在磁性材料中按需生成斯格明子等有用结构的新方法，相关成果发表于《物理评论快报》。该方法借助液晶体系，有望推动更节能、更灵活的数据存储与光学器件技术发展。

item.title: 离子交换树脂催化芝麻油环氧化反应：温度与反应时间的影响
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Laura Ospino, Rafael Rodriguez, Alexis Loaiza, Juan M. Gonzalez, Karina Ojeda-Delgado, Eduardo Sanchez-Tuirán
本研究以Amberlite IRC 120H和Dowex 50WX2两种酸性离子交换树脂为非均相催化剂，以过氧化氢/乙酸原位生成过氧乙酸、甲苯为溶剂，对芝麻油进行环氧化，并考察了催化剂类型、反应时间和温度的影响。碘值测定及FTIR、¹H NMR表征证实了C=C双键消耗和环氧基团生成；Dowex 50WX2在4小时内达到95.1%双键转化率，优于Amberlite IRC 120H的87.7%。

item.title: 面向后量子密码实现的自适应机器学习侧信道防御
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Subin S R, S. Daniel Madan Raja
针对NIST标准化的后量子密码算法（ML-KEM、ML-DSA）在物理实现层面易受侧信道攻击的问题，本文提出一种结合实时机器学习攻击检测与按威胁等级激活防御措施的自适应防护框架。基于81维迹特征的随机森林分类器在ML-KEM-768上达到ROC-AUC=1.000，在ML-DSA-65上F1=0.77，并通过具有迟滞稳定状态转换的四级威胁评估引擎实现按需防护，降低恒定开销。

item.title: 基于深度学习掩码自编码器预测金属有机框架的CO₂工作容量
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究构建了基于掩码自编码器的深度学习模型，用于预测金属有机框架（MOFs）的CO₂工作容量，旨在加速面向碳捕集应用的MOF筛选。具体方法与结果详见原文。

item.title: 基于多特征晶体图卷积神经网络的钙钛矿带隙预测
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作在晶体图卷积神经网络（CGCNN）框架中融合多种特征，用于钙钛矿材料的带隙预测，以提升预测精度并辅助光电材料筛选，详细模型与性能见原文。

item.title: 利用CALPHAD计算的神经网络代理加速MOX燃料热化学建模：与SCIANTIX的集成
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究构建神经网络代理模型替代耗时的CALPHAD热化学计算，并将其集成至SCIANTIX燃料性能程序，以加速混合氧化物（MOX）核燃料的热化学行为模拟，详细实现与精度评估见原文。

item.title: 通过铬合金化实现二维MnSe中的反铁磁半金属
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作基于第一性原理计算研究了二维MnSe经Cr合金化后的电子结构与磁性，提出一种反铁磁半金属态，为二维自旋电子学材料设计提供新思路。

item.title: 晶粒尺寸对多晶反铁电体储能性能影响的相场研究
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究利用相场模拟系统考察了晶粒尺寸对多晶反铁电材料极化滞回行为及储能密度、储能效率的影响，揭示了显微组织–储能性能间的关联，详见原文。

item.title: 基于机器学习与DFT从电子结构预测难熔高熵合金的力学性能
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作结合密度泛函理论计算和机器学习方法，利用电子结构特征作为描述符预测难熔高熵合金的力学性能，建立电子结构—力学性能映射关系以指导合金设计。

item.title: 基于机器学习原子间势理解SEI无机组分LiF和Li₂O的热导率
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究利用机器学习原子间势对锂离子电池固体电解质界面层（SEI）中关键无机组分LiF和Li₂O的晶格热输运行为进行分子动力学模拟，揭示其热导率特征及对SEI热稳定性的影响。

item.title: 通过成分、有序度和结构基元调控PtNi纳米合金的稳定性与磁性
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作通过原子尺度计算考察了PtNi纳米合金在不同组分比例、化学有序度及几何结构基元下的能量稳定性与磁矩演变，为设计兼具催化与磁性功能的纳米合金提供指导。

item.title: 通过La掺杂调控热障陶瓷SrZrO₃的热导率：基于机器学习势的计算研究
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究构建机器学习原子间势，对La掺杂SrZrO₃热障陶瓷进行分子动力学模拟，考察掺杂浓度对声子输运及热导率的调控作用，为低导热热障涂层设计提供理论依据。

item.title: 多GPU量子电路模拟及网络性能的影响
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
本文研究了基于多GPU的量子电路模拟方法，重点分析了节点间网络性能对大规模量子模拟效率与可扩展性的影响。作者评估了不同网络配置下的通信开销，并探讨了优化分布式量子模拟性能的策略。

item.title: 面向弹性血管血流的积分守恒物理信息神经网络的流固耦合训练
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
针对弹性血管中血流问题，本文提出一种结合流固耦合的积分守恒型物理信息神经网络（PINN）训练方法。该方法将守恒律以积分形式嵌入网络损失，并耦合血管壁形变，提高了对血流动力学的求解精度与稳定性。

item.title: 体相与界面化学双重调控实现富锂正极材料界面电位的实用化调节
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect Publication: Materials Today
本文提出对富锂正极进行体相与界面化学的双重调控策略，以调节其界面电位、抑制副反应并改善循环稳定性。实验验证表明该方法可有效提升富锂材料的电化学性能。

item.title: 通往交替磁性的非线性途径
item.description:
📚 Nature Nanotechnology
👤 Jian Tang, Qiong Ma
该工作利用非线性电学响应在二氧化钌薄膜中探测量子几何特征，并揭示了交替磁性（altermagnetism）的实验信号。通过非线性输运手段为识别这一新型磁有序态提供了新方法。

item.title: 深度学习辅助的暗场X射线显微术中弱衍射束识别
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 A. Benhadjira, C. Detlefs, S. Borgi, V. Favre-Nicolin, C. Yildirim
该工作提出基于深度学习的方法，用于在暗场X射线显微成像中自动识别弱衍射束。该方法有望提升数据分析效率与精度，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: CrSCl单层中Skyrmion的应变与磁场调控
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Yiqi Huo, Luo Yan, Shuo Li, and Liujiang Zhou
本文围绕二维磁性材料CrSCl单层中斯格明子的形成与调控展开，研究了应变和外磁场对斯格明子尺寸、稳定性和拓扑性质的影响，为二维自旋电子学器件设计提供理论依据。

item.title: 基于两阶段主动学习深度势模型构建金属氧化物光刻胶湿致降解路径
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Seungtae Kim, Je-Yeon Jung, Minwoo Kim, Youngmin Nam, Yoonhyun Kwak, Min Young Ha, and Won Bo Lee
本文采用两阶段主动学习策略训练深度势能（Deep Potential）模型，研究金属氧化物EUV光刻胶在湿气环境下的降解机制，揭示水分诱导的反应路径，为提升光刻胶稳定性提供原子尺度认识。

item.title: Fe3O4、MnFe2O4及Mn–Zn混合铁氧体中电子、磁振子与声子的能量本征态
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Deepak Dhariwal, Michael R. von Spakovsky, and William T. Reynolds, Jr.
该工作计算了磁铁矿、雅可比矿及Mn–Zn混合铁氧体中电子、磁振子和声子的能量本征态，为分析这些铁氧体的热力学与磁热性质提供基础数据。

item.title: 仿生梯度结构实现高韧性、形状记忆与自适应电磁吸收复合材料
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zhiwei Tuo, Hao Cheng, Kaixin Deng, Ruxuan Fang, Yonggang Yao, Jian Lu, Yusheng Shi, Bo Song
受生物结构启发，本文构建了具有梯度结构的复合材料，兼具高韧性、形状记忆与可调电磁波吸收性能，有望应用于智能隐身与结构功能一体化器件。

item.title: 范德华反铁磁体中的巨磁塞贝克效应
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yu Wu, Jie Yang, Haoran Guo, Zhongchong Lin, Yanran Sun, Hansheng Xu, Yu Ye, Licong Peng, Wenyun Yang, Rui Wu, Jinbo Yang, Zhaochu Luo
本工作在一种范德华反铁磁体中观测到巨大的磁塞贝克效应，磁场可显著调制其热电电压。结果为利用层状磁性材料开发自旋热电器件提供了新思路。

item.title: 铁电氧化铪锆薄膜中氧扩散的电极与微结构依赖性
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Liron Shvilberg, Thomas W. Pfeifer, Chuanzhen Zhou, Yong Kyu Choi, Duk‐Hyun Choe, Patrick E. Hopkins, Jon F. Ihlefeld
本文系统研究了铁电HfZrO薄膜中氧扩散行为对电极种类和薄膜微观结构的依赖性，揭示了氧迁移对器件耐久性和铁电性能的影响，为优化铁电存储器件可靠性提供指导。

item.title: 通过FABF4驱动相再分布在柔性准二维钙钛矿太阳能电池中构建软硬互穿网络
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Jishan Shi, Yichen Li, Chunmei Jia, Zhi Wan, Liming Du, Yanfang Ding, Can Li, Zhen Li
本文利用FABF4诱导准二维钙钛矿薄膜中的相再分布，构建软硬互穿网络结构，从而提升柔性钙钛矿太阳能电池的效率与机械稳定性。

item.title: 由MXene沉积物制备的梯度气凝胶用于超低反射电磁屏蔽
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zhihong Dai, Yunfa Si, Zibo Chen, Wanglei Xian, Fengxiu Yang, Xiaodong Ji, Cheng Chen, Bo Liu, Zongkui Kou, Geng Wu, Daping He
本文利用MXene制备废弃沉积物制备具有梯度结构的气凝胶，实现兼具高屏蔽效能与超低反射的电磁干扰屏蔽性能，提供了一条MXene废料高值化利用的途径。

item.title: 受挫枫叶格铁磁体中的非公度自旋密度波
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Paul L. Ebert, Yasir Iqbal, Alexander Wietek
针对Na2Mn3O7启发的混合铁磁-反铁磁相互作用，作者用精确对角化研究枫叶格上自旋1/2海森堡模型在铁磁边界附近的相图。研究未发现零场自旋向列相，但在铁磁边界附近识别出有序矢量连续演化的非公度自旋密度波区域，同时确认了共线Néel、倾斜120°和六边形单态相；变分Gutzwiller投影态测试未发现具竞争力的自旋液体描述，但在ruby格边界上Z2投影态较好地再现有限尺寸能量与关联。

item.title: 高维中的格点规范化界面与不可逆缺陷
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 David Hofmeier, Giovanna Pimenta, Weiguang Cao
本文研究高维格点模型中广义对称性的规范化界面及其缺陷后代。作者显式构造了(2+1)维Z2(0)对称性和(3+1)维Z2(1)对称性规范化的界面哈密顿量，并通过在统一非约束希尔伯特空间上定义的“移动算符”解决高阶对称性下约束希尔伯特空间随界面位置变化的问题。应用包括有限区域规范化得到的凝聚缺陷分析、规范化映射的重构，以及子群规范化（以Z2⊂Z4为例）产生带混合反常的对偶对称性及其在凝聚缺陷上的对称性分数化诊断。

item.title: Negative Differential Resistance and Ultra-High TMR in Altermagnetic Tunnel Junctions
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sajjan Sheoran, Luke Keenan, Declan Nell, Stefano Sanvito
arXiv:2605.12711v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets can replace ferromagnets in tunnel junctions, yielding large tunneling magnetoresistance, ultrafast switching, and low-power functionality. While most studies explore the linear-response regime, interesting features emerge at finite bias, where the peculiar electronic structure of altermagnets gives rise to complex non-linear behaviour. Using non-equilibrium Green's functions implemented with density functional theory, we predict that a large low-bias negative differential resistance can be observed in an altermagnetic tunnel junction. Our proposed junction incorporates the orbital-ordered altermagnet KV2Se2O, whose quasi-2D Fermi surface plays a crucial role in realizing the negative differential resistance. Upon the applicatio…

item.title: Yu-Shiba-Rusinov States in Ising Superconductors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Michael Hein, Juan Carlos Cuevas, Wolfgang Belzig
arXiv:2605.12758v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The nature of the superconducting state in two-dimensional transition-metal dichalcogenides remains under active debate. A widely used description invokes so-called Ising superconductivity. In this work, we investigate theoretically this pairing state by employing single magnetic impurities as local probes of the superconducting condensate. We analyze the formation of Yu-Shiba-Rusinov bound states in the presence of Ising spin-orbit coupling and an in-plane magnetic field to study how their spectral properties encode the underlying pairing structure. We identify distinct features in the bound-state spectrum and tunneling response that differentiate this system from conventional superconductors. Our results demonstrate that magnetic impuritie…

item.title: PACSim: A Flexible Simulation Framework for Polymer-Attenuated Coulombic Self-Assembly
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Philipp Höllmer, Nicole Smina, John P. Marquardt, Michael S. Chen, Steven van Kesteren, Stefano Sacanna, Glen M. Hocky
arXiv:2605.12870v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Polymer-Attenuated Coulombic Self-Assembly (PACS) is a flexible experimental approach for generating crystals from simple colloidal building blocks. The central components are charged spherical particles coated with a polymer brush that prevents irreversible aggregation. Whether oppositely charged colloids crystallize, and which structures they form, depends on several factors, including colloid concentration, charge, and size, as well as the salt concentration of the solution. Molecular dynamics (MD) simulations are a powerful tool for predicting the outcomes of PACS assembly experiments and also provide particle-level insight into the assembly processes. Here, we present an open-source simulation framework, PACSim, that enables MD simulati…

item.title: Competing Effect of Biquadratic and Heisenberg Coupling on Magnetic Tunnel Junction Molecular Spintronics Devices
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andoniaina Mariah Randriambololona, Hayden Brown, Eva Mutunga, Andrew Grizzle, Christopher DAngelo, Pawan Tyagi
arXiv:2605.12885v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Heisenberg exchange coupling (HC) and biquadratic exchange coupling (BQC) are known to occur in magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJ) and nanoscale spintronics structures. MTJ-based molecular spintronics devices (MTJMSD) provide a platform to study these interactions and the correlated magnetic behavior they generate. Molecular spin channels formed along the exposed MTJ edge have been shown to produce strong exchange interactions that include HC and BQC, which can drive perpendicular alignment of spin vectors in adjacent ferromagnetic electrodes. Despite their importance, the competing roles of HC and BQC in MTJMSDs remain unclear. Monte Carlo simulations using a three-dimensional Heisenberg model were performed to systematically vary BQC strength…

item.title: Topological and morphological signatures of disorder in a self-assembled, soft matter sponge network
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xueyang Feng, Suman S. Kulkarni, Michael S. Dimitriyev, Dani S. Bassett, Randall D. Kamien, Edwin L. Thomas, Gregory M. Grason
arXiv:2605.12889v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many soft matter systems exhibit ordered, polycontinuous network morphologies, such as the cubic (double) gyroid or diamond, as well as disordered network morphologies known generically as ``random sponges". While presumed to share similar local packing geometry, the structural relationship between these ordered and disordered network morphologies has remained obscure. We use slice and view scanning electron microscopy to analyze and compare multi-scale morphological features of an ordered double-gyroid morphology to the amorphous sponge morphology formed in the same block copolymer sample. We find that node valence of the minority component network of the sponge is mostly gyroidal (trivalent), with a small fraction of diamond-like (tetraval…

item.title: Grassmann tensor networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jian-Gang Kong, Jia-Ji Zhu, Z. Y. Xie
arXiv:2605.12907v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Developing non-perturbative methods to reveal exotic properties of strongly correlated fermionic systems remains one of the most essential tasks of theoretical physics. Tensor network methods with Grassmann algebra offer powerful numerical tools for fermionic many-body systems in the coherent-state path-integral representation. Despite their vast potential for both condensed-matter and particle-physics communities, Grassmann tensor network methods are somewhat underexploited in practical simulations. In this work, we provide a detailed, self-contained introduction to Grassmann tensor network methods, from the basics of the Grassmann tensor operations to the Grassmannization of typical tensor network algorithms. Furthermore, the resulting Gra…

item.title: Selective Octahedral Accommodation of Cr³⁺ and Weak Magnetic Connectivity in the Sugilite Analogue KNa₂Cr₂Li₃Si₁₂O₃₀
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yuya Haraguchi, Taishu Aoki, Daisuke Nishio-Hamane, Hiroko Aruga Katori
arXiv:2605.12986v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report the synthesis of the Cr analogue of sugilite, KNa₂Cr₂Li₃Si₁₂O₃₀, in the milarite-type framework. Rietveld refinement of a composition-conserving antisite model gives x = 0.0024(18) in KNa₂[Cr₂₋ₓLiₓ][Li₃₋ₓCrₓ]Si₁₂O₃₀, corresponding to a T2-site Cr occupancy of 0.0008(6). X-ray MEM analysis shows no detectable Cr-like density at T2. Magnetic susceptibility indicates weak antiferromagnetic interactions with θW = -4.78(7) K and no ordering above 1.8 K.

item.title: Apparent Ferroelectric Polarization Hysteresis and a Simple Method to Observe Piezoelectric Strain Loops with a Microphone
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mamoru Fukunaga
arXiv:2605.13089v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Extra components in series to non-ferroelectric capacitance can cause apparent ferroelectric D-E hysteresis loops even with the double-wave method (DWM). Characteristics of fake loops are studied withsimple circuit models, and suspicious loops of actual materials are found in some papers using the DWM. Inverse piezoelectric strain also reverses along with the polarization by the electric field, and S-E loops are considered more reliable to prove ferroelectricity than the D-E loops. But measurement of S-E loops usually requires expensive instruments in contrast to D-E loops with a simple circuit. A very simple method is developed to observe S-E loops of bulk samples with an inexpensive small electret microphone and a little expansion to the c…

item.title: Observation of end-to-end pumping in a quasiperiodic Fibonacci-type photonic chain
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Arnob Kumar Ghosh, Ang Chen, Ashraf El Hassan, Patric Holmvall, Mohamed Bourennane, Annica M. Black-Schaffer
arXiv:2605.13116v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Topological pumps offer a promising route to operate as connecting buses, supplying efficient and robust connectivity between non-neighboring elements in a network. Here, we investigate a finite quasiperiodic Fibonacci-type photonic chain and demonstrate its ability for end-to-end pumping, with only small and simple changes to the system. First, we use a tight-binding formalism to numerically show that a localized pumping state can be transferred between opposite ends of the system, with only a small structural change to the chain. Then, we experimentally implement this topological pump in an array of coupled optical waveguides, where light propagation is effectively described by the tight-binding model under the paraxial approximation, enab…

item.title: Ultrafast Critical Slowing of Spin Dynamics and Emergent Nonequilibrium Fano Interference in Fe3GeTe2
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Anupama Chauhan, Sidhanta Sahu, Satyabrata Bera, Tuhin Debnath, Mintu Mondal, Anamitra Mukherjee, Siddhartha Lal, N. Kamaraju
arXiv:2605.13121v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fe₃GeTe₂ is a prototypical metallic van der Waals ferromagnet with itinerant magnetism and a highly tunable Curie temperature, yet how electronic excitations couple to spin and lattice degrees of freedom across its magnetic transition remains largely unexplored. Here, we use two-color pump-probe reflectivity to investigate the coupled electronic, spin, and lattice dynamics. The time-resolved reflectivity exhibits a tri-exponential relaxation, in which the intermediate component shows an anomaly near the Curie temperature due to enhanced interlayer spin-lattice interactions, while the slowest component displays pronounced critical slowing down with an exponent of ~ 0.3, revealing non-universal relaxation dynamics associated with intralayer sp…

item.title: Magnesium-graphene interphase boundaries created by high-pressure torsion enhance hydrogen storage kinetics:Mechanisms and significance of activation energy and frequency factor
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Runchen Zhou, Payam Edalati, Anthony Alhayek, Shivam Dangwal, Marc Novelli, Md. Amirul Islam, Baran Bidyut Saha, Thierry Grosdidier, Kaveh Edalati
arXiv:2605.13184v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A strategy to overcome sluggish hydrogenation/dehydrogenation of magnesium is demonstrated by creating magnesium-graphene interphase boundaries via high-pressure torsion (HPT). HPT reduces the grain size of pure magnesium from 1 mm to 850 nm, with 70% of grain boundaries having high misorientation angles. Graphene addition leads to even finer grain sizes of 10-500 nm with a bimodal morphology. The magnesium-graphene composites exhibit superior kinetics at 623 K while maintaining high air resistance. Kinetic modeling reveals that the rate-controlling mechanism transits from interfacial reaction in coarse-grained magnesium to atomic diffusion in magnesium-graphene nanocomposites. Kissinger analysis shows that the activation energy for hydrogen…

item.title: Defect annihilation mechanism in the formation of dodecagonal quasicrystals
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rong Liu, Gang Cui, Tiejun Zhou, Kai Jiang
arXiv:2605.13253v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding defect evolution is essential to the structural stability of quasicrystals, yet the kinetics of defect repair remain poorly understood. Here, by combining the string method and the spring pair method, we determine the minimum energy path from defective to defect-free dodecagonal quasicrystals using a particle model with the Lennard-Jones-Gauss potential. We find that defect annihilation proceeds via three stages: phason flip, aggregation and decomposition of shield-like defects. These sequential transformations are driven by potential energy gradients and accompanied by an increase in structural symmetry. The three stages act synergistically in promoting defect annihilation, offering new insights into the microscopic repair mec…

item.title: 双三叶langbeinite K₂Ni₂(SO₄)₃中的重入行为与可能的2/3磁化平台
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Matías G. Gonzalez, Yurii Skourski, Johannes Reuther, Ivica Živković
K₂Ni₂(SO₄)₃是由两个相互缠绕的S=1三叶晶格组成的langbeinite家族成员，其中强耦合三叶晶格与弱耦合三叶晶格之间存在高度阻挫的海森堡相互作用。作者利用高达40 T的脉冲磁场实验结合经典蒙特卡洛计算，揭示了低场和中场区域的一系列相变，并发现2/3磁化平台的特征——强耦合晶格呈现1/3相而弱耦合晶格完全极化。尽管经典极限下不预期出现平台，系统仍表现出显著的dome结构，反映该自旋构型的稳定化趋势，并导致重入现象。

item.title: 倾斜量化磁场中量子阱内电子-声学声子散射
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. P. Telenkov, Yu. A. Mityagin
该工作研究了量化磁场中纵向声学声子对电子的散射问题，推导了磁场倾斜于量子阱层时的散射率表达式。通过分析这些表达式，确立了散射率随磁场强度、取向以及量子阱势阱轮廓变化的规律。该理论为理解倾斜磁场配置下量子阱中电子-声子相互作用提供了定量框架。

item.title: 可重构手性超导电性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Surajit Dutta, Nadav Auerbach, Tonghang Han, Yaozhang Zhou, Gal Shavit, Niladri-Sekhar Kander, Yuri Myasoedov, Martin E. Huber, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Long Ju, Eli Zeldov
在菱方多层石墨烯的高位移场下，自旋谷极化四分之一金属中涌现出超导电性，其输运特征暗示时间反演对称性破缺和手性超导电性(CSC)。作者利用纳米尺度SQUID尖端磁力计成像了菱方五层石墨烯中的同位旋极化畴，并通过空间分辨的热力学探测证实了时间反演对称性破缺。研究发现CSC的畴结构继承自同位旋极化的母态，且CSC相存在多种由畴壁调控的输运机制，为拓扑超导电性和非阿贝尔准粒子提供了实验基础。

item.title: 交替磁体/伊辛超导体结中的界面调控自旋过滤与非互易输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Arindam Boruah, Saumen Acharjee, Prasanta Kumar Saikia
该工作理论研究了具有自旋活性界面的交替磁体/伊辛超导体(AM/ISC)结中的自旋分辨输运、自旋过滤和非互易效应。基于修正的Bogoliubov-de Gennes框架和散射理论，表明内禀自旋-轨道耦合、各向异性AM自旋织构与自旋依赖界面散射的相互作用导致强烈的各向异性电荷与自旋电导。弱自旋混合区以螺旋度守恒输运为主，而增强的自旋-轨道耦合导致自旋选择性Andreev反射和有限自旋过滤；强自旋混合区则呈现增强的角各向异性和宽能量范围内的稳健自旋极化输运，同时常规Andreev反射被强烈抑制。非互易输运在单态超导相中持续存在。

item.title: 多模谐振腔中二维电子系统朗道能级的兰姆位移
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Aleksandr Shabanov, Georgy Alymov, Dmitry Svintsov
该工作研究了多模谐振腔对二维电子系统电磁行为的调控效应，指出现有理论常采用单模近似而忽略高阶模式。作者证明纳入大量谐振腔模式显著增强二维电子系统回旋频率的软化效应，通过将系统约化为耦合谐振子集合并求解本征频率来处理该问题；对一种偏振模式采用自能方法，对垂直偏振模式采用一阶秩更新矩阵本征值方法。该理论框架为谐振腔-电子强耦合体系的多模效应提供了系统描述。

item.title: 横场伊辛模型中的可逆对称性与自发对偶性破缺
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 José Dupont, Jasper van Wezel
横场伊辛模型的自对偶性是现代物理学中对偶性的原型，但该对偶性并非精确成立——原始模型与对偶模型具有不同对称性和基态数目，且由非可逆算符实现。作者证明通过调整为开边界条件而非周期边界条件，可获得由唯一可逆算符实现的精确对偶性。在精确对偶模型中，量子临界点处的对称性也是精确的、可逆的；且精确对偶性要求存在反常边缘自由度，实现了基于对偶性而非拓扑的体-边对应。此外，原始模型中全局对称性的自发破缺等价于对偶系统中局域对称性的自发破缺。

item.title: 从薄膜到薄片：钇铁石榴石的电子性质与磁化变化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pia M. Düring, Seema, Roman Hartmann, Sebastian Sailler, Michaela Lammel, Andrei Gloskovskii, Christoph Schlueter, Angelo Di Bernardo, Sebastian T. B. Goennenwein, Martina Müller
钇铁石榴石(YIG)因其高居里温度、极低磁阻尼和长程自旋波传输能力而成为自旋电子学和磁振子学的核心材料。该工作对比研究了块体状YIG薄膜与亚微米YIG薄片的电子结构和磁性行为，揭示了亚微米尺度下出现的独特性质。研究指出YIG薄片的几何构型和机械柔韧性可能实现不同的器件架构，为紧凑型自旋电子学器件的未来应用提供了方向。

item.title: 单斜α-RuCl₃中的磁场揭示表观振荡背后的菱方相夹杂
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hamza Nasir Daniel Balazs, Muhammad Nauman, Ezekiel Horsley, Subin Kim, Young-June Kim, K. A. Modic
α-RuCl₃的研究主要集中于面内磁场抑制反铁磁序以诱导量子自旋液体(QSL)，但温度依赖的晶体结构和应变诱导的堆垛无序使场诱导现象的解读充满争议。该工作在纳克量级晶体中分离出单斜结构，通过高分辨磁转矩磁化率测量，绘制了反铁磁相边界随温度、磁场和取向变化的相图。发现单斜相图与菱方晶体相似但系统性地移向更高转变温度和临界场，表明表观振荡现象源于菱方相夹杂，为Kitaev物理的研究提供了新的结构调控途径。

item.title: 光拍频晶格中二维偶极量子气体的位点选择性制备
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Niclas Höllrigl, Marian Kreyer, Rudolf Grimm, Emil Kirilov
强磁性镧系原子的二维偶极量子气体高分辨显微成像需要选择单个原子层，但标准磁梯度技术的适用性受限。该工作提出了一种全光学方法，利用拍频超晶格中的空间选择性参量加热，确定性地选择单层和双层冷偶极原子样品。通过将高分辨显微物镜作为两种光学频率成分的公共回射器，晶格平面被被动稳定，对实验漂移和结构振动具有极强的鲁棒性。该方法实现了与物镜焦平面的精确重合，为长程相互作用系统的单原子分辨研究奠定了基础。

item.title: 各向同性极性流体瑞利分子光散射理论的再审视
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 P. M. Déjardin
该工作通过将静电学的局域场概念适配于传播电磁波，重新考虑了稠密各向同性极性流体中瑞利光散射的分子理论，同时计入转动贡献和偶极诱导偶极(DID)贡献。推导了多种情形下侧向光散射瑞利比率的简单解析方程，包括纯DID、纯转动及混合贡献情形。纯DID情形下瑞利比率为完全解析且形式简洁；纯转动情形采用转动平均场近似，可用单一取向关联参数描述；并给出了DID主导转动和转动主导DID两种混合情形的表达式。

item.title: 非晶氧化铝涂层的高温行为：原位纳米压痕与X射线衍射研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. Zaborowska, L. Kurpaska, M. Zielinski, Q. Xu, E. Wyszkowska, J. OConnell, J. H. Neethling, F. Di Fonzo, M. Frelek-Kozak, S. Papanikolaou, R. Diduszko, J. Jagielski
该工作通过纳米压痕在25-650°C温度范围内研究了脉冲激光沉积制备的核专用非晶Al₂O₃薄膜的力学行为，并结合分子动力学模拟进行分析。结果表明非晶涂层的硬度随温度逐渐单调下降，而杨氏模量在整个温度范围内保持恒定，证实材料塑性增加并与高温下加速的键切换机制相关。透射电镜表征确认加载材料在整个压痕温度范围内保持非晶态；原位X射线衍射进一步研究了至1050°C的结构热稳定性。该方法论为核材料在役性能评估提供了参考。

item.title: 具有非对角噪声和切换环境的随机系统中信息干扰的涌现
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andrea Marchetti, Daniel Maria Busiello, Giorgio Nicoletti
自然系统中的随机力 rarely 各向同性，从流体动力学耦合的胶体到化学反应网络，噪声贡献本质上是关联的。该工作研究了具有非对角噪声矩阵和随机切换环境的线性化随机系统，揭示信息干扰的涌现——总互信息不能分解为确定性相互作用、噪声各向异性和环境切换贡献的简单求和。识别出两种信息干扰来源：确定性耦合与噪声各向异性同时存在导致的静态项，以及内部过程与环境切换相互作用导致的动态项。该框架被应用于不同物理系统，包括切换温度情形下的互信息分析。

item.title: 电子关联驱动的RuO₂交变磁性可调性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ina Park, Dongwook Kim, Jisook Hong, Beomjoon Goh, Bo Gyu Jang
本文采用DFT+DMFT方法研究RuO₂中的电子动力学关联效应，所得谱函数和光电导率与实验高度吻合。结果表明RuO₂处于顺磁-交变磁相边界以及巡游-局域化交叉的临界附近，磁基态对外部扰动极为敏感，仅约0.5%的压应变即可驱动系统进入交变磁相，从而解释了实验观测的分歧。

item.title: 若干O(n)对称模型中的相序化：慢生长、姆潘巴效应与实验关联
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wasim Akram, Nalina Vadakkayil, Sohini Chatterjee, Subir K. Das
通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究三维非守恒XY模型从顺磁相淬火到铁磁区域的相序化动力学。涡-反涡对在三维中形成线缺陷，淬火至T_f=0时特征长度按约t⁰.15增长，远小于通常的1/2指数。从不同高于临界温度的初始温度淬火时，发现高初温体系反而更快达到平衡，呈现类姆潘巴效应，并在二维和三维模拟中得到类似结果。

item.title: La₂₋ₓSrₓCuO₄奇异金属相中的奇异自旋涨落
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 B. Costarella, L. Soriano, I. Vinograd, H. Mayaffre, S. Li, J. Yang, J. Luo, R. Zhou, J. Yao, G. Gu, Q. Li, J. M. Tranquada, M. -H. Julien
利用强磁场抑制超导并采用适应电子不均匀性的NMR方案，研究x=0.25的过掺杂La₂₋ₓSrₓCuO₄。结果显示动态自旋磁化率的低能极限随温度下降持续增大，提示存在量子临界涨落，且远超条纹有序临界掺杂x=0.19。自旋动力学在空间上不均匀，暗示纳米尺度电子不均匀性可能是奇异金属行为出现的关键。

item.title: 源于规范约束的Lieb-Schultz-Mattis定理
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Bhandaru Phani Parasar
在一维链上构造耦合物质场的Z₂×Z₂规范理论，分析高斯定律子空间中的基态物理。发现该子空间存在U(1)对称性，其生成元与平移对易但与反射反对易，由此导出新型LSM定理：在平移和反射不变下基态不能为平庸有能隙态，必为自发破缺态或无能隙态。规范约束的运动学起源是该对称性的关键，并在参数空间中找到由带粒子数约束的自由Dirac费米子描述的无能隙点。

item.title: 纳米结构La₀.₆Sr₀.₄Fe₁₋ₓCoₓO₃的磁热效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fabiana N. Morales Alvarez, Mariano Quintero, Joaquín Sacanell
利用聚合物模板孔润湿法系统制备并研究La₀.₆Sr₀.₄Fe₁₋ₓCoₓO₃(x=0,0.2,0.5,0.8,1.0)纳米结构钙钛矿的磁热效应。XRD确认单相菱方结构，SEM显示Co替代使颗粒和纳米管尺寸增大；Co替代增强铁磁耦合，提高饱和磁化和居里温度。在3T外场下x=1样品的最大熵变达1.13 J/(kg·K)。

item.title: 交变磁体中由晶体反幺正对称性驱动的节点拓扑超导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiao Xiao, Arun Bansil
针对四重旋转共线交变磁体，发现晶体反幺正对称性TC₄z禁止纯自旋单态配对，并选出使BdG哈密顿量具有涌现手征对称性的配对结构。由此在宽参数区获得稳健的节点拓扑相，包括承载Majorana平带的节点点相及两类带手征Majorana边态的节点环相。即使该反幺正对称性自发破缺，节点结构仍保持，说明拓扑源于对称性受限的配对。文中提出可区分这些节点相的隧道谱学信号。

item.title: 铁电范德华波导中的巨光学自旋-轨道相互作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ding Xu, Saeed Rahmanian Koshkaki, Vicente Galicia, Chun-Ying Huang, Victoria Quirós-Cordero, Jakhangirkhodja A. Tulyagankhodjaev, André Koch Liston, Daniel G. Chica, Emma Lian, Amirhosein Amini, Yongseok Hong, Taketo Handa, P. James Schuck, Xiaoyang Zhu, Xavier Roy, Arkajit Mandal, Milan Delor
提出高双折射范德华波导作为亚微米尺度光学自旋-轨道耦合的理想片上平台，聚焦铁电半导体NbOI₂——其具备创纪录的光学非线性和介电各向异性。利用飞秒光学显微术成像光在NbOI₂板波导中越过全反射壁垒的传播与谐波转换，报道了由光学自旋霍尔效应引起的巨自旋劈裂，可在亚微米尺度分离光学自旋流，并利用自旋-动量锁定实现偏振控制的波导转向。

item.title: Hopfield网络会梦见存储模式吗？多向联想记忆中梦境的统计力学理论
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adriano Barra, Fabrizio Durante, Andrea Ladiana, Michela Marra Solazzo
提出Dreaming L方向联想记忆(DLAM)，将离线梦境与有监督异联耦合统一于单一能量函数的多层Hebbian架构，属能量基模型。利用Guerra插值法推导副本对称自由能并得到序参量的自洽方程；有效局域场分解为信号、层内梦境噪声与层间噪声。梦境通过差异化抑制经验关联矩阵的高本征值干扰提升检索；蒙特卡洛模拟（L=3）确认梦境与层间耦合协同作用，可将混合态输入按模态分层分离到各层。

item.title: 超导体-半导体异质结构的Shubnikov-de Haas表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. M. Zimmerman, Saeed Fallahi, Sergei Gronin, Tyler Lindemann, Patrick Sohr, Ray Kallaher, Alejandro Alcaraz Ramirez, Georg W. Winkler, Samuel M. L. Teicher, William Cole, Sebastian Heedt, Eoin O'Farrell, Gijs de Lange, Roman Lutchyn, Michael J. Manfra, John Watson
在Al薄膜下InAs量子阱2DEG与金属电子态耦合的异质结中，提出利用SdH振荡测量提取关键材料参数的新方法。通过分析完整磁阻数据，可获得载流子密度、自旋-轨道耦合强度以及输运与量子散射时间。2DEG中的散射时间受金属-半导体耦合强度影响，从而快速反映邻近效应所致的耦合特性。

item.title: 二维磁体2H-VTe₂中磁化方向依赖且堆叠可调的Edelstein效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Weiyi Pan, Jaroslav Fabian
基于第一性原理计算与对称性分析，证明二维面内铁磁半导体2H-VTe₂可固有产生Edelstein效应，其行为强烈依赖磁化方向。具有D3h对称的单层在+x电流下，磁化沿+x或+y时仅允许特定的时间反演偶/奇自旋累积分量；在C3v对称的AB或BA堆叠双层中，面内磁化下出现额外的自旋分量，展现堆叠可调谐性。

item.title: 手性分子对铁磁共振的贡献
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jurgen Lindner, Pedro Contreras-Gallardo, Abhishek Singh, Ruslan Salikhov, Anna Semisalova, Olav Hellwig, Rodolfo Gallardo, Anna Lewandowska-Andralojc, Kilian Lenz, Aleksandra Lindner
通过宽带铁磁共振谱研究手性分子界面对具有垂直各向异性的Co/Ni多层膜磁化动力学的影响。对比裸膜与手性分子功能化样品，未观察到共振场或线宽的可测变化。作者建立了宏观自旋模型，区分平衡态自由能景观修改(MIPAC型)效应与CISS诱导的非平衡自旋力矩：前者通过有效场移动共振条件，后者以阻尼型力矩改变有效阻尼，为后续实验解读提供框架。

item.title: 并行扫描循环神经量子态用于可扩展变分蒙特卡洛
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ejaaz Merali, Mohamed Hibat-Allah, Mohammad Kohandel, Richard T. Scalettar, Ehsan Khatami
重新审视循环神经网络量子态因顺序性而被认为不可扩展的观点，将自回归循环波函数与可并行循环架构结合，提出并行扫描循环神经量子态(PSR-NQS)，可在一维和二维变分蒙特卡洛中高效训练。通过迭代再训练，该方法在二维自旋格点上扩展至52×52，并与已有量子蒙特卡洛数据吻合，确立循环架构作为可扩展神经量子态模拟的实用路径。

item.title: 节线半金属PbTaSe₂中的可见-近红外频率双曲响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Vivian J. Santamaria-Garcia, Morgan G. Blevins, Simo Pajovic, Carolina Orona-Navar, Svetlana V. Boriskina
本工作实验证实节线半金属PbTaSe₂在可见光至近红外波段具有本征双曲光学行为，源于其各向异性电子结构与层状晶体对称性。结合第一性原理计算、椭偏仪测量、Drude-Lorentz建模及反射率测量，建立了该材料体相双曲性的统一实验-理论图像。该双曲性具有等离激元起源，在0.78 eV处品质因数Qₘₐₓ约2.8，各向异性参数|R|约231。

item.title: 原位可调超导二极管：面向无磁场无限非互易操作
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Razmik A. Hovhannisyan, Taras Golod, Amirreza Lotfian, Vladimir M. Krasnov
该研究基于四端铌平面约瑟夫森结，实现了无需外磁场的超导二极管，具备几乎无限制的原位可调性与极性可重构性。多终端结构消除了对外磁场的依赖，并展现出类高斯神经元的功能（通过再入超导性实现）。通过精细调控结参数，获得了实验分辨率内有效的无限非互易性，实现无阈值交流电流整流。这种技术简单、可重构、宽范围可调的二极管有望用于未来数字与神经形态计算。

item.title: 降低科学机器学习中的跨样本预测波动
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gordan Prastalo, Kevin Maik Jablonka
该工作揭示了科学机器学习中跨样本预测波动（cross-sample prediction churn）问题：在9个化学基准数据集上，同一训练集独立自助抽样的两个分类器总体准确率差异仅1.3-4.2个百分点，但对8.0-21.8%的测试分子预测类别不一致。标准参数端方法（深度集成、MC dropout、随机权重平均）无法缓解该问题；两种数据端方法有效：K-自助聚合（K-bootstrap bagging）可在不损失精度情况下将波动率降低40-54%；作者提出的双自助法（twin-bootstrap）以匹配计算成本进一步将波动中位数降低45%。

item.title: 自旋-轨道力矩驱动磁转变中的涌现混沌动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Lisa-Marie Kern, Kai Litzius, Victor Deinhart, Michael Schneider, Christopher Klose, Kathinka Gerlinger, Riccardo Battistelli, Daniel Metternich, Dieter Engel, Christian M. Günther, Meng-Jie Huang, Katja Höflich, Felix Büttner, Stefan Eisebitt, Bastian Pfau
利用时间分辨全息X射线显微术结合微磁模拟，该研究揭示了自旋-轨道力矩（SOT）驱动磁化动力学在纳秒至皮秒时间尺度上可出现瞬态混沌行为。通过利用各向异性工程缺陷处的确定性斯格明子产生及高分辨率泵浦-探测方案，直接追踪实空间磁化演化，发现了区分相干SOT驱动运动与瞬态不稳定性的动态相变。该不稳定区具有皮秒尺度涨落、强畴无序、拓扑不稳定性及斯格明子脱落特征，SOT激励期间系统短暂进入此区域。

item.title: 解析软固体的多尺度表面力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nicolas Bain, Lawrence A. Wilen, Dominic Gerber, Mengjie Zu, Carl P. Goodrich, Senthilkumar Duraivel, Kaarthik Varma, Harsha Koganti, Robert W. Style, Eric R. Dufresne
该工作通过测量硅凝胶界面附近小变形下的位移场，揭示了聚合物网络表面的意外多尺度响应。发现剪切模量在距界面20微米范围内平滑下降约一半，同时存在依赖于历史和外部介质组成的表面过剩弹性。这些结果揭示了聚合物表面的根本多尺度本质，呼吁对软固体界面的基础理解开展进一步的实验与理论研究。

item.title: BaTiO₃四方-正交相变下方碎裂的带电畴壁
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Petr S. Bednyakov, Iegor Rafalovskyi, Jiri Hlinka
该研究通过原位光学显微镜探究BaTiO₃晶体在四方-正交相变过程中铁电带电畴壁的演化。发现相变以下，带电畴壁相邻畴发生孪晶化，头对头带电畴壁转变为超畴壁，并碎裂为交替的微米尺度带电与不带电片段。这一观察自然解释了该畴壁电导率在相变以下骤降数个数量级的现象，因为宏观导电通道沿此类碎裂畴壁不再连续。

item.title: 通过行波赝势建立核动力学的转动平移求和规则
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Massimiliano Stengel, Miquel Royo, Emilio Artacho
该工作建立了一组精确求和规则，将原子间力常数与固体或分子的频率依赖电磁 susceptibility 关联，将转动平移对称性原理推广至非绝热区域。关键发现在于数值实现中，除非对原子赝势采取特殊处理，否则这些求和规则被破坏。作者通过使赝势正确适应相应原子核的运动（非局域算符的速度依赖），一劳永逸地解决了该问题，恢复了薛定谔方程的正确伽利略协变性及力学转动平移与电磁微扰的等价性。

item.title: 二维六角胶体晶格中点缺陷周期性势的涌现
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Huang Xicheng, Liu Zefei, Chen Yong-Cong, Yang Guohong, Ao Ping
该研究超越传统恒定扩散系数假设，考察二维六角胶体晶体中点缺陷的布朗运动。通过直接从实验轨迹提取空间变化的漂移矢量和扩散矩阵，在一般随机动力学框架内揭示了由晶体周期结构塑造的有效随机势景观。局域极小值间的能量差与先前实验估计量级一致，基于重建势景观的随机轨迹模拟重现了观测缺陷运动的基本特征。

item.title: 利用平移不变张量网络提取无序自旋链的平均性质
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kevin Vervoort, Wei Tang, Nick Bultinck
该工作发展了一种基于张量网络的方法，无需显式采样无序构型即可计算随机自旋链中的无序平均期望值。算法利用统计平移不变性，直接在热力学极限下工作。作者在随机横场伊辛模型的无限随机性临界点上对该方法进行了基准测试。

item.title: 奇异鞍点处的量子几何铁磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Taisei Kitamura, Hiroki Nakai, Akito Daido, Youichi Yanase
该工作提出了一种发生于带触摸鞍点（奇异鞍点）电子体系中的铁磁性机制。奇异鞍点处发散的量子度量诱导铁磁关联，态密度的对数发散确保Stoner理论框架内的铁磁性，这是量子几何铁磁性的典型范例。二维t₂g轨道模型通过该机制容纳铁磁性，且与严格证明的平带铁磁性连续连接。

item.title: 手性诱导自旋选择性：电子-声子散射的非线性自旋响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mayank Gupta, Andrew Grieder, Mayada Fadel, Jacopo Simoni, Junting Yu, Ravishankar Sundararaman, Yuan Ping
该工作利用含自洽自旋-轨道耦合的第一性原理时空密度矩阵动力学方法，阐明了自旋-轨道耦合、结构手性与自旋依赖电子-声子相互作用在驱动自旋和轨道角动量产生与输运中的 interplay。在原型手性固体三方硒中，定量区分了手性诱导自旋选择性（CISS）与共线Edelstein效应（CEE）：CEE产生空间均匀、与电场线性标度的自旋极化，而显式自旋依赖电子-声子散射产生非线性响应（S_z ∝ E²）和长度依赖自旋积累——CISS的标志性实验特征。识别出手性声子角动量介导的谷间散射为该非线性的微观起源。

item.title: 转角双层过渡金属硫族化合物关联态的轨道磁化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiaoyu Liu, Chong Wang, Haoran Chen, Xiao-Wei Zhang, Ting Cao, Di Xiao
该工作将现代轨道磁化理论扩展至Hartree-Fock态，证明标准表达式对Hartree-Fock轨道和哈密顿量仍然有效。在弱场Kane-Mele-Hubbard模型上验证理论与直接数值计算高度一致。应用于转角MoTe₂双层，发现每个莫尔单胞的轨道磁化量级为1个玻尔磁子，且呈现非单调的转角依赖关系。该工作为相互作用莫尔系统中的轨道磁化建立了通用理论，为解释近期实验提供定量指导。

item.title: 部分开启绝热量子点接触中的电导反常
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Donghao Liu, Dmitri Gutman
作者证明在干净的绝热量子点接触中，当通道处于部分透射状态时，即使势垒平滑也会产生电导反常。背散射诱发的Friedel振荡通过电子相互作用对电导产生奇异修正，在通道半开时达到最大，导致电导降低。垂直于自旋-轨道轴的磁场会改变单粒子谱，产生Fabry-Pérot型干涉振荡及反常的非单调磁场依赖，为实验中观察到的反常特征提供了普适解释。

item.title: 静水压力下的异金属自旋-1/2量子磁体
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. J. Coak, D. Kamenskyi, S. P. M. Curley, B. M. Huddart, J. P. Tidey, A. Chmeruk, T. Sakurai, S. Okubo, H. Ohta, S. Kimura, H. Nojiri, D. Graf, S. J. Clark, Z. E. Manson, J. L. Manson, T. Lancaster, P. A. Goddard
通过射频磁化率、电子自旋共振及压力调谐DFT计算，研究了CuVOF₄(H₂O)₆·H₂O中Cu(II)与V(IV)构成的反铁磁自旋-1/2二聚体在静水压下的温度-磁场相图演化。结果证实主交换路径经由V(IV)向连接两自旋（位于Cu Jahn-Teller轴上）的氧提供大量自旋密度的非常规机制，且异类自旋使ESR能级呈非线性磁场依赖。

item.title: 光阱中费米子¹⁶¹Dy和⁴⁰K的Feshbach分子：光致与碰撞损耗的作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Alberto Canali, Chun-Kit Wong, Luc Absil, Zhu-Xiong Ye, Marian Kreyer, Emil Kirilov, Rudolf Grimm
研究了由费米同位素¹⁶¹Dy和⁴⁰K组成的弱束缚DyK二聚体在1050–2002 nm四个波长区光偶极阱中的衰减。除2000 nm附近外，阱光致损耗为主导；在1550 nm附近找到光致损耗极小平台，可观测二聚体间的非弹性碰撞损耗。在Feshbach共振中心附近的极弱束缚二聚体中，展示了碰撞损耗的Pauli压制约一个数量级。

item.title: 范德瓦尔斯室温铁磁体Fe₅GeTe₂中的各向异性电子-声子耦合与手性声子
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Smrutiranjan Mekap, Andrzej Ptok, Jyoti Saini, Changgu Lee, Subhasis Ghosh, Anushree Roy
通过温度、波长、偏振依赖的Raman测量结合第一性原理计算，揭示了F5GT的晶格动力学和电子-声子相互作用。角分辨Raman强度表明存在各向异性电子-声子耦合及自旋-轨道耦合介导的响应；Fano不对称峰的温度依赖反映耦合的热演化，波长依赖测量确认光学共振对各向异性相互作用的增强作用。

item.title: 结合DFT与机器学习原子间势的沸石咪唑酯框架分级晶体结构预测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yizhi Xu (Faculty of Chemistry, University of Warsaw, Division of Physical Chemistry, Ruder Boskovic Institute), Jordan Dorrell (School of Metallurgy and Materials, University of Birmingham, University of Southampton), Katarina Lisac (Division of Physical Chemistry, Ruder Boskovic Institute), Ivana Brekalo (Division of Physical Chemistry, Ruder Boskovic Institute), James P. Darby (School of Engineering, University of Cambridge), Andrew J. Morris (School of Metallurgy and Materials, University of Birmingham), Mihails Arhangelskis (Faculty of Chemistry, University of Warsaw)
针对最具多形性的ZIF成员ZnIm₂，采用定制训练的机器学习原子间势对300余万随机晶体堆积进行高通量CSP采样，识别出9609个能量极小，对应1484种网络拓扑，其中855种为新颖拓扑。除一例外，所有实验已报道的ZnIm₂结构均与预测结构匹配，并结合拓扑、密度与孔隙率筛选出潜在新型框架。

item.title: 亚氧化物分子束外延与热激光外延在Al₂O₃上生长TaO₂外延薄膜
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yorick A. Birkhölzer, Anna S. Park, Noah Schnitzer, Jeffrey Z. Kaaret, Benjamin Z. Gregory, Tomas A. Kraay, Tobias Schwaigert, Matthew R. Barone, Brendan D. Faeth, Felix V. E. Hensling, Iris C. G. van den Bosch, Ellen M. Kiens, Christoph Baeumer, Enrico Bergamasco, Markus Grüninger, Alexander Bordovalos, Suresh Chaulagain, Nikolas J. Podraza, Waldemar Tokarz, Wojciech Tabis, Matthew J. Wahila, Suchismita Sarker, Christopher J. Pollock, Shun-Li Shang, Zi-Kui Liu, Nongnuch Artrith, Frank M. F. de Groot, Nicole A. Benedek, Andrej Singer, David A. Muller, Darrell G. Schlom
通过亚氧化物MBE和热激光外延，在r面蓝宝石衬底上实现亚稳TaO₂的外延稳定化，获得单取向、单畴、各向异性应变薄膜。同步辐射XRD、STEM、XAS/XPS和EELS证实Ta为+4价；椭偏测量揭示Ta 5d电子的0.3 eV Mott带隙。DFT与群论分析提示存在类似NbO₂的、伴随金属-绝缘体转变的畸变金红石结构相变潜力。

item.title: 手征自旋液体中的集体激发：手征roton与长波向列模
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hongyu Lu, Wei Zhu, Wang Yao
在自旋-1/2方格子J₁-J₂-Jχ模型的SU(2)对称手征自旋液体相中，作者结合精确对角化和时间依赖变分原理，发现两支自旋单态集体模：有限动量处的手征p波低能roton模和零动量处椭圆极化的d波高能向列模。这些模式有别于分数量子霍尔液体的指纹特征，且向列模在调节J₂时显著软化，提示与量子相变的关联。

item.title: 基于含时密度泛函理论高效预测层状反铁磁体CrSBr的高度各向异性激子性质
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ashwin Ramasubramaniam, Daniel Hernangómez-Pérez, Javier Junquera, María Camarasa-Gómez
采用带在位修正的调谐杂化泛函，作者以远低于自洽多体微扰理论的成本，准确再现了CrSBr的基本带隙、光学带隙及激子与磁序的耦合。利用此框架研究了外磁场致自旋倾斜引起的激子能移，为层状磁性材料中激子和磁光现象的建模提供高效方案。

item.title: 几何阻挫TbOF中的复杂磁相互作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pim Witte, Denis Sheptyakov, Elsa Lhotel, Nongnuch Artrith, Robin de Hoogh, Giuditta Perversi, Kim Lefmann, Machteld E. Kamminga
通过低至90 mK的磁化、比热、中子衍射测量及DFT计算，对几何阻挫的混合阴离子晶格TbOF进行了系统研究。发现9.7 K处的结构相变伴随短程磁关联（而非此前认为的长程反铁磁序）；更低温下出现非公度自旋密度波及反铁磁/铁磁关联的两次磁有序转变，2 K以下展现亚稳与磁滞行为，揭示了稀土氟氧化物中结构与磁性的复杂耦合。

item.title: 同步最优网络的涌现拓扑
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Guram Mikaberidze, Dane Taylor
作者建立了在耦合预算约束下识别同步最优加权网络的梯度优化框架。所得网络呈稀疏、二部、细长且极端单亲性（节点的邻居彼此相似但与该节点差异显著），这种结构在电网摆动方程到混沌Rössler系统等多种动力学模型中均稳定存在。为耦合Kuramoto振子构造的非线性微分方程和变分原理理论解释了上述拓扑特征及预算分配。

item.title: 通过优化LC谐振元件研究RPM JTWPAs的性能
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. A. Gali Labarias, T. Yamada, Y. Nakashima, Y. Urade, K. Inomata
通过参数化谐振器的数值优化，研究共振相位匹配约瑟夫森行波参量放大器的增益、带宽和正交压缩。优化谐振器在理想无损情况下可使最大增益和压缩提升超过5 dB；但集总元件损耗模型显示增益随损耗饱和、压缩模迅速退化，凸显谐振器设计潜力与制造损耗带来的挑战。

item.title: Zatom-1：面向三维分子与材料的多模态基础模型
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Alex Morehead, Miruna Cretu, Antonia Panescu, Rishabh Anand, Maurice Weiler, Tynan Perez, Samuel Blau, Steven Farrell, Wahid Bhimji, Anubhav Jain, Hrushikesh Sahasrabuddhe, Pietro Lio, Tommi Jaakkola, Rafael Gomez-Bombarelli, Rex Ying, N. Benjamin Erichson, Michael W. Mahoney
Zatom-1是一种跨域通用的简化Transformer架构，使用多模态流匹配目标同时建模离散原子类型和连续三维几何，统一了分子与材料的生成和预测学习。跨域生成预训练作为下游属性、能量及力多任务预测的通用初始化，在数据受控的生成和预测基准上均匹敌或超越专用基线，并将生成推理速度提升数倍以上。

item.title: Dual-Correction Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Hemodynamic Reconstruction from Sparse Data
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jingtai Song, Qinsheng Zhu, Xiaodong Xing, Yufeng Tang, Zhiyun Zhang, Xianwen Zhang, Hao Wu
arXiv:2605.12544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantifying hemodynamics in the curved segments of the intracranial internal carotid artery is a core challenge in diagnosing vascular stenosis. Conventional full-field imaging, such as 4D Flow MRI, is costly and difficult to widely promote. Meanwhile, reconstructing full-field fluid information from easily accessible and non-invasive sparse measurement data (such as transcranial Doppler ultrasound/computed tomography angiography) is essentially a highly challenging ill-posed inverse problem. To overcome the severe optimization difficulties and generalization failures of conventional physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) in highly tortuous geometries, we propose a dual-correction physics-informed neural network (DCP-INN) framework taking…

item.title: Time-Resolved Pore-Scale Imaging of Multiphase Dissolution during CO2-Saturated Brine Injection into a Carbonate: Competition between Hydrocarbon Mobilisation and Swelling
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Qianqian Ma, Rukuan Chai, Zhuangzhuang Ma, Yanghua Wang, Martin J. Blunt, Branko Bijeljic
arXiv:2605.12696v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present time-resolved pore-scale experiments in which CO2-saturated brine was injected into a water-wet Ketton limestone sample containing residual hydrocarbon under reservoir conditions (8 MPa, 50 degC) and monitored by 4D X-ray microtomography. Equivalent pore-network models were extracted at each scan time to track pore geometry, topology, and fluid occupancy, while fluid-fluid and fluid-rock interfacial areas and the effective reaction rate were determined from segmented images. The dissolution rate is non-monotonic in time and proceeds through three regimes, consistent with a shifting balance between hydrocarbon swelling and ganglion mobilisation, which control advective access to reactive surfaces. In the initial advection-dominated…

item.title: Optimal excitation and measurement patterns for networks with tree topology
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eduardo Mapurunga, Alexandre Sanfelici Bazanella
arXiv:2605.12829v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this work we evaluate the excitation and measurement patterns (EMP) for networks with tree topology. We investigate guidelines for the selection of the minimal EMPs, i.e. those with the least number of excited and measured nodes combined, for which the accuracy obtained, in terms of the trace of the asymptotic covariance matrix, is optimal. We introduce the concept of partial information matrix as a means to systematically obtain the information matrix for any dynamic network. For a specific tree class, called cross, we show that the accuracy of a particular module depends on the magnitude of the parameters to be estimated. Furthermore, when all factors are equal, it is best to excite. %we show that for small magnitudes of this parameter,…

item.title: A practical investigation on time integration in the quantized tensor train format
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Erika Ye
arXiv:2605.12833v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantized tensor trains (QTTs) are a multiscale computational framework that can potentially reduce the computational cost of solving partial differential equations and initial value problems by making low-rank approximations. However, its use is somewhat limited in practice, in part due to the challenges that arise when making low-rank approximations of the quantized data. For example, when performing long-time dynamical numerical simulations, it has been observed that the accumulation of numerical errors arising from both the discretization of the partial differential equation itself and the low-rank approximation can lead to increased rank and noise-dominated results. Focusing on a set of advection-dominated test problems relevant to elec…

item.title: Dispersion Engineered Frequency Tunable Delay Platform based on Magnetostatic Surface Waves
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chin-Yu Chang, Xingyu Du, Shun Yao, Tao Wang, Shuxian Wu, Roy H. Olsson III
arXiv:2605.12848v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reconfigurable radio-frequency front ends in modern radar and wireless systems require delay elements that simultaneously offer low-loss, low noise, compact form factor, and wideband frequency agility. However, electromagnetic, acoustic, photonic, and active-circuit delay technologies each fail to deliver this combination. Here we report a microwave delay platform based on magnetostatic surface waves (MSSWs) in microfabricated 18 μm yttrium iron garnet (YIG) waveguides, in which co-engineering the spin wave dispersion with the radiation impedance of meander-line transducers grants pitch-controlled access to distinct dispersive or near-constant group-delay regimes. Tuned continuously from 6 to 19.6 GHz under magnetic bias, the delay lines del…

item.title: Rotational energy levels in the ground vibrational state of methane with kHz-level accuracy from comb-referenced double-resonance and Lamb-dip spectroscopies
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Vinicius Silva de Oliveira, Isak Silander, Hiroyuki Sasada, Sho Okubo, Hajima Inaba, Kevin K. Lehmann, Aleksandra Foltynowicz
arXiv:2605.13060v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Methane is a key spherical-top molecule, yet restrictive selection rules for one-photon transitions have prevented determination of its ground state (GS) energies with state-of-the-art kHz-level accuracy. We report the GS rotational energy level differences with kHz-level accuracy from two frequency-comb-referenced sub-Doppler methods: optical-optical double-resonance spectroscopy in the Łambda-type configuration, and Lamb-dip spectroscopy of allowed and forbidden transitions. A Hamiltonian fit to the data yields GS term values with rotational numbers up to itJ = 12 with kHz level accuracy.

item.title: Longitudinal Localized Kick Driven Fast Extraction Method and Rapid Cycling Synchrotron Design for 3D PBS Proton FLASH Delivery
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yang Xiong, Hongjuan Yao, Shuxin Zheng
arXiv:2605.13065v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper presents the design of a rapid cycling synchrotron (RCS) featuring a longitudinal localized kick driven fast extraction system for three-dimensional (3D) pencil beam scanning (PBS) proton FLASH delivery. The extraction method is designed to accommodate a novel scanning scheme that addresses the stringent requirement for substantially shorter delivery time compared to current solutions, where the scanning layer is parallel to the proton beam direction. In this method, the kicker pulse waveform is applied selectively to specific longitudinal segments of the proton bunch. For each scanning spot, the functional region of the kicker along the longitudinal direction is dynamically adjusted based on real-time beam longitudinal line densi…

item.title: RPC Telescope Tests for Muon Detection at Laser-Plasma Accelerators
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sumaira Ikram, Maxime Lagrange, Donya Ahmadi, Anna Cimmino, Eduardo Cortina Gil, Pavel Demin, Andrea Giammanco, Ela Rockafellow, Jaron E. Shrock, A. J. Sloss, H. M. Milchberg, Michael Tytgat, Roberto Versaci
arXiv:2605.13118v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report on a feasibility study conducted at the ELBA facility at ELI Beamlines in 2025 to investigate the possible production of muons from high-energy electron beams generated by extended laser-plasma interactions in optically generated plasma waveguides. Our team operated a portable, autonomous, and compact telescope based on Resistive Plate Chamber (RPC) detectors, positioned to detect high-penetration charged particles originating from the beam dump. The campaign demonstrated that RPC detectors can operate reliably and safely in the ELBA environment, even under intense radiation and electromagnetic conditions. The collected datasets, though statistically limited and affected by lack of beam control, allow detailed characterization of t…

item.title: Wavelength-driven photoelectron momentum tilt in XUV Ionization
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Neha Kukreti, Amol R. Holkundkar
arXiv:2605.13400v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate how atomic structure influences photoelectron momentum distributions (PMDs) in single-photon ionization by a linearly polarized extreme-ultraviolet (XUV) pulse. We demonstrate that the PMD tilt is governed not only by the magnetic quantum number but also by the radial structure of the bound atomic orbital. While neon exhibits a smooth wavelength dependence of the PMD tilt, argon displays a non-monotonic behavior characterized by suppression and reversal of the tilt at a critical wavelength. A partial-wave analysis reveals that this behavior arises from interference between s- and d-wave channels, with the reversal originating from a minimum in the d-wave radial dipole matrix element induced by the radial node in the argon 3p o…

item.title: Plastics and Composite Materials
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ana Teresa Perez Fontenla
arXiv:2605.13506v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Polymers and composite materials play an essential role in accelerator and detectors technology, with varying roles that range from electrical insulation and structural support to thermal management. This paper provides a general review of their key properties and classifications, including behaviour under demanding service conditions such as cryogenic operation and high radiation exposure. The paper addresses polymeric materials - their mechanical, thermal, and viscoelastic behaviour, and the effects of crystallinity and additives - alongside composite families, focusing on the characteristics of the matrix and the types of reinforcement. CERN case studies illustrate how both polymers and composites present opportunities and challenges in m…

item.title: Beam-Driven Transverse Deflecting Structure for Femtosecond Electron-Beam Diagnostics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 S. Tomin, D. Bazyl, W. Decking, I. Zagorodnov
arXiv:2605.13752v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High-resolution longitudinal phase-space (LPS) diagnostics are essential for X-ray free-electron lasers and advanced accelerators. Conventional radio-frequency transverse deflecting structures (TDSs) provide direct femtosecond-scale LPS measurements, but their substantial RF-power and infrastructure requirements strongly limit their deployment at multi-GeV beam energies. Here, we propose a beam-driven transverse deflecting structure in which a leading driver bunch, separated by one RF bucket from the beam of interest, excites long-lived transverse wakefields in a resonant cavity array. The scheme combines the linear longitudinal-to-transverse mapping of an active TDS with the simplicity of a passive wakefield device. A delayed witness bunch…

item.title: Integrated ytterbium gain for visible-near-infrared photonics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tianyi Zeng, Erik W. Masselink, Tsung-Han Wu, Nathan Brooks, Peter Chang, Grisha Spektor, Zachary L. Newman, Danxian Liu, Scott B. Papp, David R. Carlson, Scott A. Diddams, Kiyoul Yang
arXiv:2605.13828v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Rare-earth gain media form the foundation of modern optical communications, emerging quantum hardware, and ultrafast optics. While chip-scale integration can enable fiber-like, and potentially beyond-fiber, functionality with unprecedented scalability, development in the visible and near-infrared remains in its early stages. Here, we demonstrate ytterbium-based optical gain integrated into an aluminum oxide photonic platform, achieving both single-mode lasing and optical amplification in the near-infrared regime. This platform delivers optical amplification with output powers exceeding 0.5 W, an optical-to-optical conversion efficiency above 70%, and a noise figure of 3.3 dB, approaching the quantum limit for phase-insensitive amplification.…

item.title: 图上的量子混沌：硅光子学平台
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 H. Girin, X. Chécoury, B. Odouard, S. Bittner, J. -R. Coudevylle, B. Dietz, C. Lafargue, M. Lebental
作者构建了一种可灵活配置的硅基光波导网络平台，用于在光子系统中实现Kottos与Smilansky提出的量子（波）图。实验证实强混沌（混合）图的谱统计符合随机矩阵理论预言，而较弱混沌（遍历）图则偏离这一预言，验证了Bohigas-Giannoni-Schmit猜想。该平台还可获取波函数空间分布，用于检验量子遍历性定理。
